name: Zahtar - Mid Eastern Spice
recipeInstructions:
1. Dry roast the sesame seeds over a medium heat for a few minutes, stirring frequently.
2. Allow to cool completely.
3. Mix with the sumac and thyme in a bowl until well combined.
4. Store the blend in an airtight jar; it will keep for 3-4 months.
5. Use as a sprinkle on meatballs or vegetables, or spread on bread before baking.
